'''鈭歝h-v-m-f''' ('''kachavmefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luge|luge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luge|luge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-v-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kachavmefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichavmefoko|thichavmefoko]] || [[word:jichavmefoko|jichavmefoko]] || [[word:shichavmefoko|shichavmefoko]] || [[word:kichavmefoko|kichavmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchavmefoko|thuthuchavmefoko]] || [[word:jujuchavmefoko|jujuchavmefoko]] || [[word:shushuchavmefoko|shushuchavmefoko]] || [[word:kukuchavmefoko|kukuchavmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchavmefoko|thuchavmefoko]] || [[word:juchavmefoko|juchavmefoko]] || [[word:shuchavmefoko|shuchavmefoko]] || [[word:kuchavmefoko|kuchavmefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchavmefoko|thuchavmefoko]] || [[word:juchavmefoko|juchavmefoko]] || [[word:shuchavmefoko|shuchavmefoko]] || [[word:kuchavmefoko|kuchavmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechavmefoko|thechavmefoko]] || [[word:jechavmefoko|jechavmefoko]] || [[word:shechavmefoko|shechavmefoko]] || [[word:kechavmefoko|kechavmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochavmefoko|thothochavmefoko]] || [[word:jojochavmefoko|jojochavmefoko]] || [[word:shoshochavmefoko|shoshochavmefoko]] || [[word:kokochavmefoko|kokochavmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochavmefoko|thochavmefoko]] || [[word:jochavmefoko|jochavmefoko]] || [[word:shochavmefoko|shochavmefoko]] || [[word:kochavmefoko|kochavmefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochavmefoko|thochavmefoko]] || [[word:jochavmefoko|jochavmefoko]] || [[word:shochavmefoko|shochavmefoko]] || [[word:kochavmefoko|kochavmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chavmefoko|th忙chavmefoko]] || [[word:j忙chavmefoko|j忙chavmefoko]] || [[word:sh忙chavmefoko|sh忙chavmefoko]] || [[word:k忙chavmefoko|k忙chavmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachavmefoko|thathachavmefoko]] || [[word:jajachavmefoko|jajachavmefoko]] || [[word:shashachavmefoko|shashachavmefoko]] || [[word:kakachavmefoko|kakachavmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachavmefoko|thachavmefoko]] || [[word:jachavmefoko|jachavmefoko]] || [[word:shachavmefoko|shachavmefoko]] || [[word:kachavmefoko|kachavmefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachavmefoko|thachavmefoko]] || [[word:jachavmefoko|jachavmefoko]] || [[word:shachavmefoko|shachavmefoko]] || [[word:kachavmefoko|kachavmefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
